provenance.name: Business Memory Immutable context snapshots API
Business Memory Outcome and lesson capture API
Business Memory Structured and semantic search API
Business Memory Source and freshness lineage API

ZYVORA Business Memory Technical Specification v1.0

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Memory never becomes the transactional source of truth for operational entities.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Captured context remains reconstructable after source records change.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Permission filters execute before semantic retrieval.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Corrections create linked superseding versions.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Sources, capture time, actor, and policy are mandatory.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Tenant data never enters a general training corpus without explicit authorization.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: Legal holds override scheduled deletion.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.

test_scenarios.scenario: Verify business rule: A lesson must link to an outcome or be labeled as an observation.
test_scenarios.expected: Exact approved rule holds for valid, invalid, boundary, and concurrent cases.
